rationale: Educ. Code §13.202 governs petitions to abolish an independent school district. It is wholly unrelated to the residence homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 13.202. PETITION. Abolition of an independent school district is initiated by a petition requesting an election on the question.
_note: Rule text concerns school district abolition petitions; no bearing on homestead exemption amounts.
